goal: Build a belt-to-belt handoff: cubes ride Conv1 (input), robot picks each, drops on Conv2 (transfer), Conv2 carries them to a downstream Bin. Tests robot-mediated belt-to-belt transfer + drop_target on a moving belt rather than static bin.
thoughts:
Six belt-to-belt specifics for CP-26 (extends CP-02 — single robot, dual belt):
1) Conv1 (input) at y=+0.4, surface_velocity=[0.2, 0, 0]. Cubes start at far -X, move +X past robot's pick zone.
2) Conv2 (transfer) at y=-0.4, surface_velocity=[0.2, 0, 0]. Robot drops cubes here; Conv2 carries to Bin at far +X.
3) Bin at end of Conv2 (x=+1.5, y=-0.4). Cubes that fall off Conv2 land here (or fall over bin rim).
4) drop_target = [-0.5, -0.4, 0.86] — explicit drop position above Conv2's belt top. cuRobo handler uses this scalar drop_target (not drop_targets dict — all 4 cubes drop at same xy).
5) After drop, Conv2's belt motion carries cube +X. Eventually cube falls off Conv2's end (x=+1.5) into Bin or table.
6) Tests robot-mediated transfer where DESTINATION is a moving belt, not a static bin. Belt-on-belt drop is industrially common (pre-sortation transfer).
code:
# DomeLight + Ground + Cell + Table
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cell", prim_type="Xform")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[1.5, 0.5, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

robot_wizard(
    robot_name="franka_panda",
    dest_path="/World/Franka",
    position=[0, 0, 0.75],
    orientation=[0.7071068, 0, 0, 0.7071068],
)

# Input conveyor — y=+0.4
create_conveyor(
    prim_path="/World/Conv1",
    position=[0.0, 0.4, 0.78],
    size=[3.0, 0.4, 0.05],
    surface_velocity=[0.2, 0, 0],
)

# Transfer conveyor — y=-0.4 (where robot drops)
create_conveyor(
    prim_path="/World/Conv2",
    position=[0.0, -0.4, 0.78],
    size=[3.0, 0.4, 0.05],
    surface_velocity=[0.2, 0, 0],
)

for i, x in enumerate([-1.4, -1.15, -0.9, -0.65]):
    path = f"/World/Cube_{i+1}"
    create_prim(prim_path=path, prim_type="Cube", position=[x, 0.4, 0.835], size=0.05)
    for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
        apply_api_schema(prim_path=path, schema_name=api)

bulk_set_attribute(
    prim_paths=[f"/World/Cube_{i+1}" for i in range(4)],
    attr="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold",
    value=0.0,
)
for path in [f"/World/Cube_{i+1}" for i in range(4)]:
    apply_physics_material(prim_path=path, material_name="rubber")

# Bin downstream of Conv2 (catches cubes that exit belt)
create_bin(prim_path="/World/Bin", position=[1.7, -0.4, 0.75], size=[0.3, 0.3, 0.15])

add_proximity_sensor(sensor_path="/World/PickSensor", position=[0.4, 0.4, 0.835], size=[0.06, 0.06, 0.06])

# Drop target on Conv2's belt surface — explicit (not bin center)
setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path="/World/Franka",
    target_source="curobo",
    sensor_path="/World/PickSensor",
    belt_path="/World/Conv1",
    source_paths=[f"/World/Cube_{i+1}" for i in range(4)],
    destination_path="/World/Conv2",
    drop_target=[-0.5, -0.4, 0.86],
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", "/World/Conv1", "/World/Conv2", "/World/Bin"],
)
extension_notes: CP-26 demonstrates robot-mediated belt-to-belt transfer — destination is a moving belt, not a static bin. Cube continues motion via Conv2's belt friction. Industrial use: pre-sortation transfer (off line A onto line B). Future: with vision-gate, cube-color decides which sub-belt of Conv2 to drop on (multi-lane sortation).
failure_modes: Drop target z too low — cube placed below belt top → physics pushes through. Used z=0.86 (= 0.81 belt-top + 0.025 cube-half + 0.025 clearance).
Conv2 too narrow — cube falls off side. 0.4m wide; cube 5cm; 17.5cm margin per side. Adequate.
Bin too far downstream — cube falls off Conv2 end (x=+1.5) before reaching Bin (x=+1.7). 0.2m gap; cube falls 5cm onto Ground. Acceptable.
Sensor on Conv1 only — no pick decision needed for Conv2 (cube just rides). Standard CP-01 sensor pattern.
verified_status: build-spec-2026-04-XX; form-gate ✓; function-gate ✓ (postal sorter — Mode A 3-strike + cuRobo pre-step belt-pause)
code_template:
# DomeLight + Ground + Cell + Table
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cell", prim_type="Xform")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[1.5, 0.5, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

robot_wizard(
    robot_name={{primary_robot.class}},
    dest_path={{primary_robot.path}},
    position={{primary_robot.position}},
    orientation={{primary_robot.orientation}},
)

# Input conveyor — y=+0.4
create_conveyor(
    prim_path={{input_conveyor.path}},
    position={{input_conveyor.position}},
    size={{input_conveyor.size}},
    surface_velocity={{input_conveyor.surface_velocity}},
)

# Transfer conveyor — y=-0.4 (where robot drops)
create_conveyor(
    prim_path={{transfer_conveyor.path}},
    position={{transfer_conveyor.position}},
    size={{transfer_conveyor.size}},
    surface_velocity={{transfer_conveyor.surface_velocity}},
)

create_prim(prim_path={{workpieces[0].path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{workpieces[0].position}}, size=0.05)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path={{workpieces[0].path}}, schema_name=api)
create_prim(prim_path={{workpieces[1].path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{workpieces[1].position}}, size=0.05)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path={{workpieces[1].path}}, schema_name=api)
create_prim(prim_path={{workpieces[2].path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{workpieces[2].position}}, size=0.05)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path={{workpieces[2].path}}, schema_name=api)
create_prim(prim_path={{workpieces[3].path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{workpieces[3].position}}, size=0.05)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path={{workpieces[3].path}}, schema_name=api)

bulk_set_attribute(
    prim_paths=[{{workpieces[0].path}}, {{workpieces[1].path}}, {{workpieces[2].path}}, {{workpieces[3].path}}],
    attr="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold",
    value=0.0,
)
for path in [{{workpieces[0].path}}, {{workpieces[1].path}}, {{workpieces[2].path}}, {{workpieces[3].path}}]:
    apply_physics_material(prim_path=path, material_name="rubber")

# Bin downstream of Conv2 (catches cubes that exit belt)
create_bin(prim_path={{exit_bin.path}}, position={{exit_bin.position}}, size={{exit_bin.size}})

add_proximity_sensor(sensor_path={{pick_sensor.path}}, position={{pick_sensor.position}}, size={{pick_sensor.size}})

# Drop target on Conv2's belt surface — explicit (not bin center)
setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path={{primary_robot.path}},
    target_source="curobo",
    sensor_path={{pick_sensor.path}},
    belt_path={{input_conveyor.path}},
    source_paths=[{{workpieces[0].path}}, {{workpieces[1].path}}, {{workpieces[2].path}}, {{workpieces[3].path}}],
    destination_path={{transfer_conveyor.path}},
    drop_target={{transfer_conveyor.drop_target}},
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", {{input_conveyor.path}}, {{transfer_conveyor.path}}, {{exit_bin.path}}],
)
